title: Add progress_bar option to image pull
body: Add a new arg option called progress_bar that when set to true will display a progress bar with the image pull progress. This uses the compat endpoint as that is the data we are able to parse to displat the progress bar.

comments.body:
This is what the progress bar looks like - it is basically a bar for each layer being pulled and switches from Downloading to Download complete when done.

![Screenshot from 2023-11-09 12-59-18](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/assets/29377163/b6f3d3d4-2809-4b54-b1c1-f44bbdd31572)
